description_long: This house is a large, detached residential property surrounded by a perimeter wall, featuring multiple interconnected structures with varying roof heights. The main building has a prominent gable roof in dark gray, with symmetrical windows and a double driveway leading to the entrance. The property includes a secondary building at the rear, likely serving as a garage or guest house, and a central courtyard area with landscaping elements such as palm trees and a circular feature. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roofing, and the windows are arranged in regular patterns across the facades. The property is set within a rectangular lot, with paved walkways and driveways providing access throughout. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional suburban architectural elements.
description: A large, light-colored house with dark gable roofs, symmetrical windows, and a central courtyard, surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double driveway, symmetrical windows, and palm trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long profile of the house, the perimeter wall, and the secondary building at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage or guest house, central courtyard, and the back of the main structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the property, including the courtyard and landscaping details.
attribute_entryway_design: Double driveway leading to a central entry with steps, flanked by palm trees and a covered porch.
